person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Eve founded a priory of nuns on St. Michael's hill, Bristol, England where she died Prioress 12 MAR 1170, and was buried with her husband.

«b»Research Notes«/b»
Eve has been disconnected from parents Estmond and Godiva for lack of evidence and that they both may never have existed.

zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eve FitzEstmond於大約1099年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，她的父親Estmond de Mercia34歲，母親Lady Godiva Of Normandy30歲。她於1119年與Robert FitzHarding結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1168年3月12日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年70歲，埋葬在英國布里斯托布里斯托 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eve FitzEstmond于大约1099年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，她的父亲Estmond de Mercia34岁，母亲Lady Godiva Of Normandy30岁。她于1119年与Robert FitzHarding结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1168年3月12日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年70岁，埋葬在英国布里斯托布里斯托 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Eve FitzEstmond was born about 1099, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Estmond de Mercia, was 34 and her mother, Lady Godiva Of Normandy, was 30. She married Robert FitzHarding in 1119. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 12 March 1168, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eve FitzEstmond est née environ 1099, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Estmond de Mercia, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Godiva Of Normandy, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert FitzHarding en 1119. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1168, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eve FitzEstmond um 1099 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Estmond de Mercia 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Godiva Of Normandy 30. Sie hat 1119 Robert FitzHarding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1168 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eve FitzEstmond è nata il circa 1099 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Estmond de Mercia, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Godiva Of Normandy, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert FitzHarding nel 1119. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1168, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve FitzEstmondが約1099年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Estmond de Merciaは34歳，母Lady Godiva Of Normandyは30歳であった。1119年にRobert FitzHardingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1168年3月12日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで70歳で死去し，イギリスブリストルブリストル カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eve FitzEstmond(이)가 대략 1099년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Estmond de Mercia(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Godiva Of Normandy(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1119년 Robert FitzHarding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1168년 3월 12일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 브리스톨 브리스톨 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eve FitzEstmond nasceu aproximadamente 1099, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Estmond de Mercia, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Godiva Of Normandy, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert FitzHarding em 1119. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1168, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eve FitzEstmond родилась около 1099 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Estmond de Mercia было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Godiva Of Normandy, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert FitzHarding в 1119 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 12 марта 1168 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности бристол кэтедраль, бристол, Англия.

sm.between 1127 and 1216: mai le 1127 e o'o I le 1216

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eve FitzEstmond nació aproximadamente 1099, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Estmond de Mercia, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Godiva Of Normandy, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert FitzHarding en 1119. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1168, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, Inglaterra.
